old_value: {"id":"dot-6hq","title":"Refactor themes to canonical TOML source + generated app configs","description":"Introduce a canonical per-theme TOML source of truth and a generator to produce themes/configs, themes/meta, and themes/themes.json consistently on macOS; remove drift and special-cases before adding new themes like vantablack.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:37:32Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:37:32Z"}

{"id":"dot-9d9","title":"Port Omarchy Vantablack theme into dotfiles theme switcher","description":"Analyze Omarchy vantablack assets and map them into themes/meta, themes/configs, themes/themes.json, theme-set cycle list, wallpapers, and any app-specific compatibility gaps (Ghostty built-in theme, OpenCode custom theme).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:17:19Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:17:23Z"}

{"id":"dot-6hq.1","title":"Design TOML schema + migration contract","description":"Define the canonical themes/sources/\u003ctheme\u003e.toml schema, required/optional keys, app identifiers, override semantics, and artifact generation contract.","acceptance_criteria":"Schema doc and migration contract are committed and unambiguous enough for a fresh-context implementer to execute without prior discussion.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z"}

{"id":"dot-6hq.2","title":"Implement theme-build core parser + validator","description":"Build theme-build core that loads TOML theme sources into a normalized model and validates format/required keys with actionable errors.","acceptance_criteria":"theme-build supports parse+validate on all source themes and returns non-zero with clear diagnostics on invalid input.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z"}

{"id":"dot-6hq.3","title":"Generate metadata artifacts from canonical TOML","description":"Generate non-app artifacts (themes/meta/*.env and themes/themes.json) from canonical TOML with deterministic formatting and ordering.","acceptance_criteria":"Generated metadata artifacts are reproducible and match schema values exactly for all migrated themes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z"}

{"id":"dot-6hq.4","title":"Generate per-app theme configs from canonical TOML","description":"Generate themes/configs/\u003ctheme\u003e/ app files from TOML with consistent color transforms and override hooks for theme-specific customizations.","acceptance_criteria":"All supported app config artifacts are generated deterministically and pass parity checks for existing themes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z"}

{"id":"dot-6hq.5","title":"Refactor theme-set to consume generated artifacts","description":"Simplify theme-set to application orchestration only, remove hardcoded theme assumptions, and generalize OpenCode custom-theme support.","acceptance_criteria":"theme-set no longer depends on duplicated manual theme data and works with generated artifacts for every theme.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:39Z"}

{"id":"dot-6hq.6","title":"Verify migration and update documentation + guardrails","description":"Run migration parity checks, smoke test theme switching, and document the new authoring workflow including build/check commands.","acceptance_criteria":"Refactor is documented end-to-end and includes a check command that prevents source/generated drift.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:40Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:40Z"}

{"id":"dot-6hq.1.1","title":"Write canonical TOML schema spec","description":"Create schema specification (keys, types, required fields, conventions) for themes/sources/\u003ctheme\u003e.toml, with one concrete example.","acceptance_criteria":"Spec includes required key list, color format rules, identifier fields, and override structure.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"stevedimakos97@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:40Z","created_by":"steez","updated_at":"2026-03-03T16:56:40Z"}
